text: I'm really confused! I thought my subscription would renew automatically, but now it says I need to pay again? Can someone please explain this? It's frustrating!
hey, so my account is all messed up. like, I can't even log in? also, I thought I had a free trial but I was charged. what's up with that?

Hello, I hope you're doing well! I have a question about the difference between the pro and business tiers of your service. Could you please provide a detailed explanation of the features included in each? Thank you very much!
I wanted a refund for my order, but I actually loved the product, so I'm not sure if I should ask for it or not.

Hey there! I really need some assistance with my account. So, I was trying to log in yesterday after binge-watching my favorite show, and I realized that my password doesn't seem to work anymore. I also remember having some issues last week when I tried to change my profile picture, and it just wouldn't upload. Anyway, I hope you can help me with this account recovery thing because I don't want to lose access to all my awesome playlists and stuff. Thanks a ton!
Dear support team, I hope you can assist me with an inquiry regarding my recent order. I have some questions but I'm not entirely sure what I should include. Thank you.

Hello, I've been trying to log into my account for the past hour and I keep getting an error message that says my password is incorrect. But I'm pretty sure I’m using the right one? I even tried resetting it, but then I didn't receive the email for the reset link. Can you please help me figure out what's going on? I really need access to my account ASAP!
I received the wrong item in my order, and it's very frustrating.
Hey, I ordered a shirt but got the wrong size sent 😩. Can I get a refund or something? This is so frustating.
I can't believe my account got locked! I need help so badly, this is so frustrating!!!

I am very frustrated right now! This has happened multiple times, and I'm really tired of it. I expected much better service from your company and it's just not what I was promised. Can someone please explain why this is happening again? I'm seriously considering switching to a different provider if this continues. It’s unacceptable!

I recently placed an order and was promised delivery within two days. However, it has now been over a week and I have yet to receive my package. This is quite frustrating, and I would like to know where my order is and why it has been delayed.
I was charged for something I didn’t even want, can you take care of it?
I am unable to access my account although I recently logged in without any issues. Can you help with this?
I need to get my money back for the last purchase. It wasn’t what I expected, and I can't find the button anywhere to request it. Can you help?

I am totally not satisfied with ur service, it’s been like, MONTHS since I first reached out about my account and still no resolution. Honestly, can you even call this customer service? This is just ridiculous and I cannot believe how poorly I'm being treated. I just want it fixed, is that too much to ask?!
